items.title: Six years after “DeFi Summer” is the sun already setting on the decentralized finance revolution?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The potential decline of DeFi could impact Solana's ecosystem, as reduced interest may limit liquidity and innovation in decentralized applications.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide, oil jumps on renewed U.S.-Iran war risks
items.whyYouShouldCare: Geopolitical tensions affecting oil prices can create volatility in crypto markets, including Solana, which may influence investor sentiment and liquidity.

items.title: Solana Dominates Q1, But Cracks Appear as Ethereum Gains Ground
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's strong Q1 performance is at risk as Ethereum's resurgence could shift developer and user focus, impacting Solana's market positioning and ecosystem growth.
